TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Luo_Yunxi, title = Luo_Yunxi, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Luo_Yunxi} }

S.FORM: kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Luo Yunxi , squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Luo Yunxi minkahul Chengdu, Sichuan na Cyukoku. pinqbaqan nya Luo Yunxi, t'aring kawas tay 2006 tehuk kawas tay 2010, mqwas biru sa Shanghai m_yugi' pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Luo Yunxi hiya ga m'engi. Luo Yunxi ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga (2018) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors

kawas tay 1988, ryax sa tay 28 nqu tay 7, Luo Yunxi , squliq na Cyukoku'. qyanux na sraral Luo Yunxi minkahul Chengdu, Sichuan na Cyukoku. pinqbaqan nya Luo Yunxi, t'aring kawas tay 2006 tehuk kawas tay 2010, mqwas biru sa Shanghai m_yugi' pqwsan biru krahu. qnxan nya mintzyuwaw nya Luo Yunxi hiya ga m'engi. Luo Yunxi ima pincyuwagan nya zyuwaw ga (2018) cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj ** nqu taj *, luo junxi , s~ɕquliq na ʦ~ʨjukokuʔ. qjanux na s~ɕraral luo junxi minkaħul ʦ~ʨħeŋ*u, s~ɕiʦ~ʨħuan na ʦ~ʨjukoku. pinqβaqan nja luo junxi, tʔariŋ kawas~ɕ taj **** teħuk kawas~ɕ taj ****, mqwas~ɕ βiru s~ɕa s~ɕħaŋħai məjuɣiʔ pqws~ɕan βiru kraħu. qnxan nja mintzjuwaw nja luo junxi ħija ɣa mʔeŋi. luo junxi ima pinʦ~ʨjuwaɣan nja zjuwaw ɣa (****) ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
